set.name: GFD
set.longname: Garfield themed proxies, centered around Ygra, Eater of All as Garfield

card.name: Garfield, Eater of All
card.text: Ward—Sacrifice a Food. Other creatures are Food artifacts in addition to their other types and have "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this permanent: You gain 3 life." Whenever a Food is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, put two +1/+1 counters on Ygra.
